items.caption: A step-by-step diagram illustrating the process of a multiple-barrier system for containing and isolating used nuclear fuel. it features a cylindrical object, possibly a fuel rod, interacting with a series of barriers. the barriers are depicted in a sequence of five steps, with arrows indicating the direction of the fuel rod's movement. each barrier is shown in a different stage of contact with the fuel rod, demonstrating the containment process. the diagram is educational and technical in nature, focusing on the safety measures in nuclear facilities.
